Package microui.core

Class GraphicsBuffer

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
microui.core.GraphicsBuffer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
public class GraphicsBuffer extends SpatialView
A container for managing off-screen graphics buffers with composable buffered views. GraphicsBuffer provides a flexible way to render multiple BufferedView components to an off-screen PGraphics buffer before compositing them onto the main drawing surface.
See Also:
  • SpatialView
  • BufferedView

  • Constructor Details

    • GraphicsBuffer

      public GraphicsBuffer(float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Constructs a GraphicsBuffer with specified position and dimensions. Creates an initial graphics buffer and sets up default properties.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the buffer's top-left corner
      y - the y-coordinate of the buffer's top-left corner
      width - the width of the buffer
      height - the height of the buffer

    • GraphicsBuffer

      public GraphicsBuffer(SpatialView spatialView)
      Constructs a GraphicsBuffer with position and dimensions from a SpatialView.
      Parameters:
      spatialView - the SpatialView to copy bounds from
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if spatialView is null

    • GraphicsBuffer

      public GraphicsBuffer()
      Constructs a GraphicsBuffer at position (0,0) with zero dimensions. Useful when bounds will be set later.

  • Method Details

    • onDraw

      public void onDraw(processing.core.PGraphics graphics)
      Optional override method for custom drawing directly to the graphics buffer. Called during rendering before any BufferedView components are drawn.
      Parameters:
      graphics - the graphics buffer to draw to

    • isAutoClearBufferEnabled

      public boolean isAutoClearBufferEnabled()
      Checks if the buffer is automatically cleared before each render cycle.
      Returns:
      true if auto-clear is enabled, false otherwise

    • setAutoClearBufferEnabled

      public void setAutoClearBufferEnabled(boolean autoClearBufferEnabled)
      Enables or disables automatic clearing of the buffer before each render cycle. When enabled, the buffer is cleared to transparency before rendering.
      Parameters:
      autoClearBufferEnabled - true to enable auto-clear, false to disable

    • getGraphics

      public final processing.core.PGraphics getGraphics()
      Gets the underlying PGraphics buffer. Useful for direct manipulation of the graphics context.
      Returns:
      the PGraphics buffer

    • addBufferedView

      public final void addBufferedView(BufferedView bufferedView)
      Adds a BufferedView to be rendered to this graphics buffer. BufferedViews are drawn in the order they are added.
      Parameters:
      bufferedView - the BufferedView to add
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if bufferedView is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if bufferedView is already added

    • removeBufferedView

      public final void removeBufferedView(BufferedView bufferedView)
      Removes a BufferedView from this graphics buffer.
      Parameters:
      bufferedView - the BufferedView to remove
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if bufferedView is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if bufferedView is not in the list
